trigger: Any real name, email, phone, address, access need, incident detail, payment, member number, signature, authority record, or official Toastmasters record in public files
response: Stop release, remove file, audit, and record private incident

trigger: No named First Nations authority or quorum for activation decision
response: Hold activation until authority pathway is approved

trigger: Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, or reporting not approved
response: Hold or no-go until IDS/data governance pass exists

trigger: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, PIA, retention, or incident response is incomplete
response: Hold intake until privacy decision is recorded

trigger: No approved workspace, access register, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, or logs
response: Hold activation until environment drill passes

trigger: No-private-access roles, provider, supporter, or public reviewer can see private records
response: Revoke access, audit, and rerun role test

trigger: Forms, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter records enter public/pilot package
response: Move to official route and pause pilot

trigger: No owner can pause intake, support participant, or run breach/cultural safety escalation
Participant cannot withdraw or correct private record
response: Hold intake until route is tested

risk: Provider receives real data too early
trigger: Provider gets real export before authority, contract, privacy, and access pass
response: Deny export and use fake/sample package only

trigger: Small sample or contextual wording can identify a founder, participant, support need, or incident
response: Rewrite as aggregate or hold public update

trigger: Team cannot prove recovery, export, deletion, or retention pathway
No response owner or response clock for support, withdrawal, correction, or access needs
Pilot has no review date, retention/deletion rule, or closeout owner
Second pilot, provider handoff, or broader rollout starts before closeout and authority record
response: No-go scale path until closeout and authority pass

trigger: Go/hold/no-go record lacks conditions, expiry, owner, no-go triggers, or monitoring schedule
response: Hold activation until decision record is complete

trigger: No hour 0-72 checks or authority checkpoint after activation
response: Hold activation or pause at hour 0

trigger: No single review of stage status, dependencies, blockers, owners, and evidence before decision
response: Run v3.3 control tower review first
